ai_cover_storage_not_ready: The image is not available in storage yet. Wait a few seconds and try generating again.
ai_design_ios_save_footer: On iPhone: after tapping Save image, choose Save Image or Add to Photos from the sheet.
ai_design_save_ios_hint: Choose Save Image or Add to Photos from the share menu.
ai_design_save_long_press_hint: Long-press the preview image, then choose Save to Photos.
ai_design_stash_hint: Tap a thumbnail to restore a previous image. Up to 5 images are kept this session.
ai_design_stash_replaced_oldest: New image saved; oldest stash image replaced (max 5).
ai_design_studio_preview_empty: Your image will appear here after generation.
ai_design_studio_prompt_placeholder: Example: warm sunset on a beach, earthy tones, no text…
ai_design_studio_subtitle: Pick image type and size, describe what you want, then download the result.
ai_design_studio_success: Image created — you can download it now.
ai_design_use_navigate_ok: Image saved — continue from the create page.
ai_gemini_billing_exhausted: Dine Credits in the app are separate from Google AI Prepay. Google returned “prepayment credits depleted” for Firebase project dinebuddies — top up Prepay in AI Studio (ai.studio/projects → dinebuddies → Billing), not the in-app wallet.
ai_generate_failed: AI generation failed. Please try again.
ai_image_generation_failed: Image generation failed. Try a different description or check Imagen settings on the server.
ai_insufficient_credits_default: Insufficient balance. You need more credits to complete this action.
ai_malformed_response: Could not read the AI response. Try again with a shorter prompt.
ai_prompt_dating_default: Write a dating invitation title and a short romantic message suited to the occasion.
ai_prompt_placeholder: Describe what you want (e.g. weekend lunch offer at an Italian restaurant…) — or leave blank to use form details.
ai_prompt_private_invitation_default: Write a private invitation title and welcoming message suited to the occasion and venue.
ai_prompt_public_invitation_default: Write an invitation title and welcoming message suited to the context above
ai_prompt_required: Enter a short description of what you want AI to generate.
ai_request_timeout: Image generation timed out. Generation may still be running on the server — wait and try again.
ai_service_unavailable: Image generation is unavailable. Check Firebase AI and Storage settings on Vercel.
featured_post_paid_only: Featured posts require a paid business plan.
featured_post_published: Featured post published to the home feed!
featured_title_required: Add a headline for your featured post.
magic_cover_applied_toast: AI cover applied to this invitation.
magic_cover_apply_explain: Apply updates the title, message, colors, font, motion, and cover image on this draft. You can still edit everything afterward.
magic_cover_aspect_hint: 4:5 portrait — matches the hero layout in the card preview below.
magic_cover_cta_subline: Optional — you can publish with a normal photo. Paid: about {{cost}} credits per successful generation. Choose aspect ratio, add notes, generate, then apply only if you want it.
magic_cover_cta_subline_generic: Optional — you can publish with a normal photo. Credits are charged per successful generation on the server.
magic_cover_discard_credits_note: Discarding does not refund credits — they were already charged when generation succeeded.
magic_cover_empty_brief_fallback: No extra host notes. Infer a short inviting title and message from the stated vibe, venue type, and place.
magic_cover_fab_title: Optional AI cover — paid; tap to open
magic_cover_generated_review: Cover generated. Review the preview, then apply to your invitation when ready.
magic_cover_inline_hint: Optional paid AI cover — tap the wand to open.
magic_cover_moderation_failed: The generated image did not pass moderation. Credits were refunded if the server could not complete the request.
magic_cover_optional_intro: You do not need AI to publish. Keep a normal photo or venue image from the media section — this tool is only if you want an auto-styled cover and suggested text.
magic_cover_paid_notice: Paid add-on: about {{cost}} credits per successful generation. Credits are deducted as soon as generation succeeds, even if you close this panel without applying the result to your invitation.
magic_cover_paid_notice_generic: Paid add-on: credits are charged per successful generation on the server. The exact amount depends on your account and promotions.
magic_cover_reference_error: Could not use this image. Try a smaller file or another format.
magic_cover_reference_hint: Optional: attach a photo for Gemini to match mood, colors, or setting. The generated cover stays text-free and original.
magic_cover_reference_invalid: Please choose an image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF).
magic_cover_requires_venue: Choose a venue from search above to enable Generate Magic Cover.
magic_cover_sign_in_to_scroll: Sign in to use Magic cover in the section above.
smart_bio_disclaimer: This uses your form fields only (no cloud AI). Uncheck items you do not want in the message.
smart_bio_disclaimer_ai: Options below control which details are sent to the AI. The button requests 10 short headlines from the server (Gemini); no key is stored in the app.
smart_bio_suggestions_hint: Tap a line to use it as your message (you can edit it after).
studio_backdrop_hint: Pick a gradient backdrop — without an image it fills the design. With an image: shows behind the image and text bar in the header.
studio_fx_pick: Enable the effect — tap the color swatch and drag to pick a color
studio_overlay_hint: Layer over image/cover — pick a color then adjust density with − and + (0–100%).
studio_post_permission_denied: No permission to save the post. Ensure your account is a business account and Firestore rules are deployed.
studio_promo_hint: Icon is pinned to a corner — tap × to remove
studio_promo_max: All four corners are full — remove an icon to add another
studio_promo_pick: Pick an icon to place on the design
studio_publish_hint: Publish to feed and home page
studio_published_feed: Published to feed and home page
